LineShot.name: Line Shot
LineShot.description: An attack that hits all units in a straight line.

LineShot2.description: A stronger attack that hits all units in a straight line.

HailOfNails.name: Hail of Nails
HailOfNails.description: An attack that hits all units in a perpendicular line.

HailOfNails2.description: An attack that hits and Immobilizes all units in a perpendicular line.

Marked2.name: Marked
Marked2.description: Inflict Marked on a unit and all other units of the same type.

ScatterShot.name: Scatter Shot
ScatterShot.description: Fire a bunch of shots randomly in an area.

ScatterShot2.description: Fire a bunch of shots randomly in a large area.

BrambleShot.name: Bramble Shot
BrambleShot.description: Fire a shot that spawns brambles in an area.

BrambleShot2.description: Fire a shot that spawns brambles in a large area.

BearTrap.name: Bear Trap
BearTrap.description: Set a trap within 5 tiles that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.

BearTrap2.description: Set a trap on any tile that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.

Harpoon.name: Harpoon
Harpoon.description: Hook onto something in a straight line and drag yourself to it.

Harpoon2.description:
Hook onto something in a straight line and drag yourself to it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

CrossShot.name: Cross Shot
CrossShot.description: Shoot four projectiles in an X shape.

CrossShot2.description: Shoot four penetrating projectiles in an X shape.

SpawnBaitTrap.name: Bait Trap
SpawnBaitTrap.description: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies.

SpawnBaitTrap2.description: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies and inflicts Poison and Slow when eaten.

BombShot.name: Bomb Shot
BombShot.description: Toss a bomb that explodes and knocks units away.

BombShot2.description: Toss a large bomb that explodes and knocks units away.

FireShot.name: Fire Shot
FireShot.description: Shoot a projectile that inflicts Burn 2 and lights fires.

FireShot2.description: Shoot a projectile with infinite range that inflicts Burn 4 and lights fires.

TrailBlazer.name: Trail Blazer
TrailBlazer.description: Increase your movement. You're unaffected by tile effects until the end of the turn.

TrailBlazer2.description: Double your movement.  You're unaffected by tile effects until the end of the turn.

FocusShot.name: Focus Shot
FocusShot.description: Aim at a unit. On your next turn, shoot a projectile that always crits and ignores shield at that unit.

FocusShot2.description: Shoot a projectile that always crits and ignores shield.

Shards.name: Shards
Shards.description: Shoot a projectile that spawns glass.

Shards2.description: Shoot a projectile that spawns glass in an area and inflicts Bleed 2.

TerrainWalk.name: Terrain Walk
TerrainWalk.description: Teleport to any grass or water tile.

TerrainWalk2.description: Teleport to any grass or water tile. Gain Stealth.

Extend.name: Extend
Extend.description: Give a unit +3 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

Extend2.name: Extend
Extend2.description: Give a unit +20 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

ChaosShot.name: Chaos Shot
ChaosShot.description: Shoot a random unit within range.

ChaosShot2.description: Shoot a random unit within range, twice!

NeedleShot.name: Needle Shot
NeedleShot.description: Shoot a needle that deals damage, gives Thorns, and ignores shield.

NeedleShot2.description: Shoot a needle that deals damage, gives Thorns, and ignores shield. This deals extra damage to enemies and gives extra Thorns to allies.

SpikeTrap.name: Spike Trap
SpikeTrap.description: Set a trap that deals 8 damage.

SpikeTrap2.description: Set a trap that deals 13 damage.

FleaShot.name: Flea Shot
FleaShot.description: Shoot a flea at a unit.

FleaShot2.description: Shoot a [img:champion] flea at a unit.

WebTrap.name: Web Trap
WebTrap.description: Set a trap that webs non-bug units that walk through it.

WebTrap2.description: Set a web trap on any tile that webs non-bug units that walk through it.

LastHit.name: Last Hit
LastHit.description: Deal 1 damage to a unit. If this kills it, refresh your basic attack.

LastHit2.description:
Deal 1 damage to a unit. If this kills it, refresh your basic attack. This ignores shield and can't miss.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

CupidsArrow.name: Cupid's Arrow
CupidsArrow.description: A shot that damages and inflicts Charm.

CupidsArrow2.description:
A shot that damages and inflicts Charm 2.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ArrowFlurry.name: Arrow Flurry
ArrowFlurry.description: Shoot 5 weak shots, each one has a 50% chance to miss.

ArrowFlurry2.description: Shoot 5 weak shots, each one has a 50% chance to miss and 50% chance to crit!

HeavyShot.name: Heavy Shot
HeavyShot.description: Shoot a high damage shot with a 70% chance to miss.

HeavyShot2.description:
Shoot a high damage shot with a 70% chance to miss and a 50% chance to crit.
[s:.7](This spell has increased range.)[/s]

StakeOut.name: Stake Out
StakeOut.description:
End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn.)[/s]

StakeOut2.description:
End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Costs 0 mana. Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn other than your movement action.)[/s]

BallOfSpiders.name: Ball of Spiders
BallOfSpiders.description: Throw a spider egg that spawns 3 spiderlings on impact.

BallOfSpiders2.description: Throw a stronger spider egg that spawns 3 spiderlings on impact.

Snipe.name: Snipe
Snipe.description: Fire a shot exactly 6 tiles away that ignores shield and can't miss.

Snipe2.description: Fire a stronger shot exactly 6 tiles away that ignores shield, can't miss, and has a 50% chance to crit.

Diversion.name: Diversion
Diversion.description: Shoot a pebble. All enemies within 3 tiles move toward it.

Diversion2.description: Shoot a pebble. All enemies within 3 tiles move toward it and gain Confusion.

ArrowSmith.name: Arrowsmith
ArrowSmith.description: Gain +1 Bonus Attack at the start of your next turn.

ArrowSmith2.description: You or another unit gains +1 Bonus Attack at the start of their next turn.

TacticalRetreat.name: Tactical Retreat
TacticalRetreat.description: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a bear trap on the tile you teleported from.

TacticalRetreat2.description: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a baited bear trap on the tile you teleported from.

Infest.name: Infest
Infest.description: Toss a spider egg that deals low damage and inflicts Infested.

Infest2.description: Toss a spider egg that deals low damage and inflicts Infested 2.

CollectPelt.name: Collect Pelt
CollectPelt.description: Destroy a body. Equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

CollectPelt2.description: Destroy a body. Create a big food pickup and equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

SentryMode.name: Sentry Mode
SentryMode.description: The next time an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.

SentryMode2.name: Sentry Mode
SentryMode2.description: Until your next turn, whenever an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.

Pheromones.name: Pheromones
Pheromones.description: Inflict Charm on a unit. If it's an enemy, it takes an extra turn immediately.

Pheromones2.name: Pheromones
Pheromones2.description: Inflict Charm on a unit. It takes an extra turn immediately.

SpawnTomTomFriend2.description: Spawn a charmed Tom Tom on any tile.

ScoutMe.name: Scout Me
ScoutMe.description:
Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

ScoutMe2.description:
Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

ShootHere.name: Shoot Here!
ShootHere.description:
Instructs your friend to shoot an adjacent tile!
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

CraftArrow.name: Craft Arrow
CraftArrow.description: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +1 Bonus Attack instead of its normal effects.

CraftArrow2.description:
Collect all pickups within two tiles of you. Gain +1 Bonus Attack for each pickup instead of their normal effects.
[s:.7](This spell costs 1 mana.)[/s]

CharmTrap.name: Charm Trap
CharmTrap.description: Spawn a trap that deals damage and inflicts Charm 1.

CharmTrap2.description:
Spawn a trap that deals damage and inflicts Charm 1.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BounceShot.name: Bounce Shot
BounceShot.description: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles.

BounceShot2.description: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles. They take 5 damage if they collide with something.

Picnic.name: Picnic
Picnic.description: You and adjacent units each heal 5 HP.

Picnic2.description: You and adjacent units each heal 5 HP and gain +1 Damage.

SoothingShot.name: Soothing Shot
SoothingShot.description: A ranged shot that heals and inflicts Charmed 1.

SoothingShot2.name: Soothing Shot
SoothingShot2.description:
A ranged shot that heals and inflicts Charmed 2.
Against allies this cleanses debuffs and inflicts Charmed 1 instead.

Vivisect.name: Vivisect
Vivisect.description: A melee attack that spawns a baited bear trap if it kills a unit or destroys a body.

Vivisect2.name: Vivisect
Vivisect2.description: A lobbed attack that spawns a baited bear trap if it kills a unit or destroys a body.

PoisonLace.name: Poison Lace
PoisonLace.description: Give yourself or an adjacent unit +1 Poison Lace.

PoisonLace2.description: Give yourself or any other unit +1 Poison Lace.

SlopThePigs.name: Slop the Pigs
SlopThePigs.description: Each familiar in an area gains All Stats Up and heals 4 HP. Other units in the area gain +1 [img:con] and heal 2 HP.

SlopThePigs2.description:
Each familiar in an area gains All Stats Up and heals 4 HP. Other units in the area gain +1 [img:con] and heal 2 HP.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

SpiderInjector.name: Egg Sac Trap
SpiderInjector.description: Spawn a spider egg trap that inflicts Infested 4.

SpiderInjector2.description: Spawn a spider egg trap that deals damage and inflicts Infested 4.

PersistentHunt.name: Persistent Hunt
PersistentHunt.description:
Inflict Marked 5 on a unit. 
RELOAD: Kill an enemy.

PersistentHunt2.description:
Inflict Marked 5 on a unit.
RELOAD: Kill an enemy.
This spell starts reloaded.

Bunker.name: Hedge In
Bunker.description: Spawn bear traps on each adjacent tile.

Bunker2.description: Spawn bear traps on each tile exactly 2 tiles away.
